description: Implement profile-aware SVG spec definitions, linting, and LSP behavior

tasks.title: Add snapshot ids, alias resolution, and pinned metadata in svg-data
tasks.description: Done when svg-data exposes canonical snapshot ids, resolves aliases case-insensitively, accepts long-form synonyms, and publishes pinned metadata including source URL, snapshot date, stable_base, and errata_folded.

tasks.title: Split spec lifecycle from browser compat status
tasks.description: Done when svg-data exposes a separate spec lifecycle model that does not reuse browser compat experimental or deprecated flags.

tasks.title: Add profile-aware lookup APIs in svg-data
tasks.description: Done when svg-data can resolve elements, attributes, and child policies against a selected snapshot/profile.

tasks.title: Add namespace-aware lint core and UnsupportedInProfile
tasks.description: Done when svg-lint validates only SVG namespace nodes, emits UnsupportedInProfile, and keeps unknown separate from unsupported.

tasks.title: Wire profile config into LSP
tasks.description: Done when initializationOptions and didChangeConfiguration can select a profile and open docs are re-linted on change.

tasks.title: Make completions lifecycle-aware
tasks.description: Done when completions hide unsupported items and annotate experimental and deprecated entries with lifecycle detail.

tasks.title: Make hover lifecycle-aware
tasks.description: Done when hover shows spec lifecycle separately from browser support for the selected profile.

tasks.title: Add snapshot and profile regression tests
tasks.description: Done when svg-data, svg-lint, and svg-language-server each cover the profile-aware cases described in the spec.
